## Checklist

- [ ] If you edited `framework/claude/`, you ran `python3 scripts/sync_agents.py` and committed the regenerated files.
- [ ] Existing tests pass (`python3 -m unittest scripts/tests/test_*.py`).
- [ ] If behavior changed, docs (README / guides / framework/claude/CLAUDE.md) are updated.
- [ ] If you added or changed a skill, the [CONTRIBUTING.md skill checklist](https://github.com/rkawaishi/workato-dev-kit/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#new-skill-checklist) is satisfied.
- [ ] You have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/rkawaishi/workato-dev-kit/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) and the [Code of Conduct](https://github.com/rkawaishi/workato-dev-kit/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
